'''âsh-j-y-n''' ('''kashajyenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:centumize|centumize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:centumize|centumize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-j-y-n
|-
! Lemma
| kashajyenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishajyenoko|thishajyenoko]] || [[word:jishajyenoko|jishajyenoko]] || [[word:shishajyenoko|shishajyenoko]] || [[word:kishajyenoko|kishajyenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushajyenoko|thuthushajyenoko]] || [[word:jujushajyenoko|jujushajyenoko]] || [[word:shushushajyenoko|shushushajyenoko]] || [[word:kukushajyenoko|kukushajyenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushajyenoko|thushajyenoko]] || [[word:jushajyenoko|jushajyenoko]] || [[word:shushajyenoko|shushajyenoko]] || [[word:kushajyenoko|kushajyenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushajyenoko|thushajyenoko]] || [[word:jushajyenoko|jushajyenoko]] || [[word:shushajyenoko|shushajyenoko]] || [[word:kushajyenoko|kushajyenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshajyenoko|thoshajyenoko]] || [[word:joshajyenoko|joshajyenoko]] || [[word:shoshajyenoko|shoshajyenoko]] || [[word:koshajyenoko|koshajyenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshajyenoko|thoshajyenoko]] || [[word:joshajyenoko|joshajyenoko]] || [[word:shoshajyenoko|shoshajyenoko]] || [[word:koshajyenoko|koshajyenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshajyenoko|thĂŠshajyenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠshajyenoko|jĂŠshajyenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠshajyenoko|shĂŠshajyenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠshajyenoko|kĂŠshajyenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashajyenoko|thathashajyenoko]] || [[word:jajashajyenoko|jajashajyenoko]] || [[word:shashashajyenoko|shashashajyenoko]] || [[word:kakashajyenoko|kakashajyenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashajyenoko|thashajyenoko]] || [[word:jashajyenoko|jashajyenoko]] || [[word:shashajyenoko|shashajyenoko]] || [[word:kashajyenoko|kashajyenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashajyenoko|thashajyenoko]] || [[word:jashajyenoko|jashajyenoko]] || [[word:shashajyenoko|shashajyenoko]] || [[word:kashajyenoko|kashajyenoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shashajyenithi|shashajyenithi]] || [[word:shashajyeniji|shashajyeniji]] || [[word:shashajyenishi|shashajyenishi]] || [[word:shashajyeniki|shashajyeniki]]
